creator: freebsd@breatheless.net
text:
A kernel panic happens when I tcpdump and emit ping on the interface
	on which the IPsec channel is initiated.

How-To-Repeat: 	Setup an IPsec tunnel between two boxes in transport mode with racoon.
	Both nodes have the same configuration (modulo IP of course).
	Initiate negociation of the IPsec key exchange by pinging the other end.
	Run a tcpdump on the interface.
	A kernel panic occurs.
